_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted ZTool runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.0-alfa/ZTool-1.1.0-alfa-Setup.exe, setup sha256 aba70c7fe15fa9192c2ccd0900ab55e378a7e1af730a223eba716971865a7197. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
